differential_diagnoses: Common Variable Immunodeficiency (CVID) with recurrent pyogenic liver abscesses
Cryptogenic multifocal ulcerous stenosing enteritis or other gastrointestinal source of seeding
next_steps: Perform Dihydrorhodamine (DHR) flow cytometry test to screen for Chronic Granulomatous Disease
Measure quantitative serum immunoglobulins (IgG, IgA, IgM) and vaccine-specific antibody titers
Perform 16S rRNA gene sequencing on liver biopsy tissue to identify fastidious organisms
Obtain Transesophageal echocardiography (TEE) to rule out culture-negative endocarditis
Order whole-body PET/CT scan to identify potential deep-seated foci not seen on standard CT
Perform targeted PCR testing on liver tissue for Bartonella, Tropheryma whipplei, and Mycobacterium species
